name: Joshua Chepyegon Kandie
bio: Hon. Joshua Chepyegon Kandie is the sitting Member of the National Assembly for Baringo Central Constituency, Baringo County, representing the United Democratic Alliance (UDA) in the 13th Parliament. He was first elected to the seat in 2017 on a Maendeleo Chap Chap Party ticket, and was re-elected in 2022 after switching to UDA.

Now in his second term, having first been elected in 2017, he chairs the National Assembly's Public Petitions Committee.

Eve Akinyi Obara is the sitting Member of the National Assembly for Kabondo Kasipul Constituency in Homa Bay County, a seat she was first elected to in 2017 and re-elected to in 2022 in the 13th Parliament of Kenya. Mary Maingi is the Member of the National Assembly for Mwea Constituency in Kirinyaga County, representing the United Democratic Alliance (UDA), and is a sitting member of Kenya's 13th Parliament (2022–2027). She was elected in the August 2022 general election, defeating six opponents to become the first female MP for Mwea, and is the only woman among Kirinyaga's four elected constituency MPs.

Samuel Gonzi Rai is the current Member of the National Assembly for Kinango Constituency, Kwale County, serving in the 13th Parliament (2022-2027) on the Pamoja African Alliance (PAA) ticket, to which he was re-elected in the August 2022 general election after losing the seat in 2017. First elected to Parliament in 1992 on a KANU ticket following the death of Ali Bidu, he was subsequently re-elected in 2002 and 2007 on the Ford-People ticket.

name: David Gikaria
bio: Hon. David Gikaria is the sitting Member of the National Assembly for Nakuru Town East constituency in Nakuru County, representing the United Democratic Alliance (UDA) in the 13th Parliament (2022–2027). He was elected to a third term in the 2022 general election, having first been elected in 2013 on a TNA ticket and re-elected in 2017.

name: Samuel Arama
bio: Hon. Samuel Arama is the sitting Member of the National Assembly for Nakuru Town West constituency, Nakuru County, elected on a Jubilee Party (JP) ticket. First elected in 2013, he is serving his third term, having also been returned in the 2017 and 2022 general elections.

name: Charity Kathambi Chepkwony
bio: Hon. Charity Kathambi Chepkwony is a Kenyan politician serving as the Member of Parliament for Njoro Constituency, Nakuru County, on a UDA ticket. She was first elected in 2017 and re-elected in 2022, and is serving her second term in the 13th Parliament.

name: Marianne Kitany

She was elected in 2022 with 42,015 votes, defeating the incumbent Cornelly Serem. Before her election, she served as chief of staff to Deputy President William Ruto.

name: Jerusha Mongina Momanyi

She was re-elected to this seat in 2022 with 84,843 votes, having first been elected Nyamira Woman Representative in 2017 during the 12th Parliament.

name: Stephen Mogaka

name: Rahab Mukami Wachira
bio: Hon. Rahab Mukami Wachira is the Woman Representative for Nyeri County in the National Assembly of Kenya, serving in the 13th Parliament (2022–2027). She was elected on the United Democratic Alliance (UDA) ticket, aligned with the Kenya Kwanza coalition, having won the 2022 Nyeri County Woman Representative seat with 200,155 votes (about 88 percent). In May 2026 she was also elected President of the Pan-African Parliament Women's Caucus.
